name: Marvel 's Venom Round Plush Squeaky Dog Toy
description: Make a furry Marvel fan’s day with the round Venom plush! This round plush, available only at Chewy, has a cuddleable cover, soft stuffing and a squeaker inside to keep your furry sidekick engaged in all the fun and games. Whether it’s time for interactive play like fetch or catch, a little bit of solo game time or your best friend just needs a good cuddle buddy, your pup’s favorite Marvel villain is up to the task!
